summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating classification for each hydrated open PR. This inventory shard has no shared canonical, and none of the PRs are safe duplicate, superseded, low-signal, merge, or closure candidates under the provided evidence.

actions.reason: Independent open contributor bug-fix PR; keep it out of closure or dedupe actions for this inventory shard.
Independent open first-time contributor bug-fix PR with proof still failing; keep it open and do not close or merge from this inventory shard.
Independent open gateway bug-fix PR with useful scoped code; keep it open for normal maintainer review rather than inventing a canonical or closure path.
Independent open contributor bug-fix PR with failing checks and bot-review context; not safe for closure, merge, or fixed-by-candidate classification in this inventory shard.
Independent maintainer-owned draft regression PR; keep open for maintainer workflow and do not close or classify against the unrelated inventory items.
